name: Formula One 2000
attribution: Historical data derived from f1db (github.com/f1db/f1db, CC BY 4.0)
AI ratings from the community F-V10_Gen2_2000.xml custom-AI set, matching the F1_Season_2000 skinpack (F1_2000 2.21)
notes: Full-grid coverage: all 23 seats of the 2000 F1 season (11 teams x 2 cars, plus the Jaguar #7 mid-season swap) are bound to liveries in the F-V10_Gen2_2000.xml set; there are no uncovered f1db entrants.
The Jaguar #7 seat is shared: Eddie Irvine (rounds 1-9, 11-17) and Luciano Burti, who deputised for the injured Irvine at the Austrian GP (round 10). Both carry the source XML's #7 liveries.

Class: F-V10_Gen2 (F-V10_Gen2_2000.xml). McLaren is bound to the mclaren_mp416 model; the other ten teams use the formula_v10 model. The installed AI file also carries season-specific F-V10_Gen2_2000_Audi.xml and a large per-track (tracks="...") override set (263 patch entries scripting real-2000 retirements/pace); those patches are not carried into this pack's aiOverrides in this version.
Authored team reliability is derived from f1db 2000 mechanical retirement rates (1 - mechanical DNFs / starts), excluding collisions, spins and accidents.

pointsAdjustments: McLaren-Mercedes was docked its Austrian GP constructors points (missing ECU seal); Hakkinen kept the race win. Copied verbatim from the oracle points catalog (data/rules/f1-points-systems.json, 2000).

Placeholder rounds (format v1.1): Australia/Melbourne -> Adelaide Modern, France/Magny-Cours -> Le Mans Circuit Bugatti, Malaysia/Sepang -> modern Hockenheim GP. Each keeps its real venue identity with laps recomputed to preserve the historical race distance. Sepang has no period AMS2 counterpart; the Tilke-designed modern Hockenheim GP is used as a same-era, same-designer character stand-in.

grid.size on every round is the smaller of that round's covered f1db starters and the mapped track's Max AI participants; setupGuide opponents = grid.size - 1. The 2000 field is 22 cars, within every mapped track's AI cap, so grids run 20-22 depending on that round's starters.
